channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Billionaires already couldnât talk to their grandchildren. Now theyâre on opposite sides of the AI divide
item.description: Citi reports AI usage rose to 22% from 13% in a year, even as principals stress data privacy is non-negotiable and fear exposure through SaaS tools.

item.title: How Kelly Ortberg is rebuilding Boeing from the inside out
item.description: Kelly Ortberg inherited Boeing's worst crisis in decades. His strategy: stop chasing Wall Street and refocus on building planes properly.

item.title: Exclusive: Binance adds U.S. stocks in âsuper appâ push, plans to launch tokenized shares
item.description: Binance is offering over 7,000 stocks and ETFs commission-free to non-U.S. users, and plans to soon allow tokenization of stock on its BN platform.

item.title: From GE's hot seat to Substack: Jeff Immelt opens up about his new chapter and why he's ready to speak candidly now
item.description: Plus: All the latest news and office chatter from Fortune.
